titleStmt.title: SII 9.87: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 87. (A.R. No. 253 of 1918.) ON THE SAME SLAB.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 956, Bhāva, Paushya, śu. 1 [2*], Budhavāra, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1034 December 2 Wednesday. It refers itself to the reign of Chālukya king Jagadēkamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Jagadēkamalla-Udayādityadēva, “lord of Kāñchī,” ruling over Noḷaṁbavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand, Kadambaḷige-thousand, [Kōgaḷi] five-hundred, Ballakunde three-hundred, Kudiharage seventy and Kariviḍi thirty. It records that Udayādityadēva made gifts of some plots of land for the service of the god Bhōgēśvaradēva of Talavage and for the maintenance of the worshippers, the musicians and the stone masons.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī
llabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ parama
kaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
mānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi sa
madhigatapaṁcamahāsabda pallavānvayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ pallavakula
tiḷakanamōghavākyaṁ kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ śrīmajjagadēkamallanudayāditya
dēva noḷaṁbapallavapermmānaḍigaḷ noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramuṁ ka
daṁbaḷiga sāyira ynūramaṁ ballakuṁde mūnūramaṁ kudiharageye
rppattu kariviḍi mūvattu pañcagrāmegaḷumaṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭa
pratipāḷanadiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttire . svasti saka
varṣa 956 neya bhāvasaṁvatsarada pauṣya su 12 budhavāramuttarā
yaṇasaṁkrāntiyandu śrīmadudayādityadēva kōgaḷiyaynūrara
kaṁpaṇaṁ bikkiganerppattaṟoḷagaṇa talavageya bhōgēśvaradēvarge piriya
keṟeya keḷage dēvarupakaruṇakkaṁ śrīkhaṇḍakkaṁ biṭṭa tōṭa
deleya baḷḷiyaynūṟu mattamākeṟeya keḷage nivēdyakke
baṭṭagaddeya kamma nālnūṟu mattaṁ paḍuva mahādēvarakaṭṭa
da keḷage gaddeya mattarmmūṟu Avaṟoḷage maṭake gaddeya kamma
nālnūṟu paṟekāṟargge gadde mattarondu pāḍuvarge gadde mattarondu dē
vara pūjāhārige gadde kammavinnūṟu kalukuṭiga mārasiṁghōjaṁge ga
rddeya kammaṁ mūnūṟu nīrggundada baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuva kisukāḍa mattarirppa
ttanālku Avaṟoḷage paṟekāṟargge mattareṇṭu pāḍuvargge mattareṁṭu
maṭake matta mūḻu vaṁciduggayyaṁge mattarondu kalukuṭiga māra
siṁghōjaṁge mattarnnālku miṇnayyageṟeya keḷage kaṁciyabbe tanna ko
ḷaṁgeyyūḷage dēvara nivēdyakke biṭṭa gaddeya kamma nūṟayvattu . © © .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā . śaṣṭirvariṣasahasrāṇi mi
ṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
